message:
feat(alloc): add per-pane arena byte accounting with peak watermark tracking

Introduce PaneArenaStats and PaneArenaSnapshot types to track logical
byte ownership per pane arena. The PaneArenaRegistry now maintains
tracked_bytes, peak_tracked_bytes, and an update counter for each pane
reservation, exposed via set_tracked_bytes(), stats(), and
stats_snapshot() APIs.

Wire estimated_bytes() into PaneEntry and call set_tracked_bytes() at
every mutation point in PaneRegistry: discovery_tick (new + updated
panes), set/clear priority overrides, and expired override purging.
Expose stats through the IPC pane_arenas endpoint with tracked_bytes,
peak_tracked_bytes, and updates fields.

Add unit tests for registry byte tracking lifecycle and IPC response
field validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
